GenAiFunction.description: UC9-LWC v1 — rich card variant. Generates an ADL-grounded clinical briefing as a flat CLT with primitives + parallel List<String> arrays (titles + bodies) for structured talking-point rendering. No nested inner classes. Briefing text retained as fallback. Delegates to GetClinicalBriefingAction for prompt-template invocation.
GenAiFunction.progressIndicatorMessage: Pulling clinical capabilities for visit prep
